evals.prompt: Create a new Flutter e-commerce app with auth, products, and cart features. My org is com.shopify and the project should be called shop_app. Include test scaffolding.
evals.expected_output: Complete Flutter project structure with 3 features (auth, products, cart), pubspec.yaml with Riverpod/GoRouter/Dio/Freezed stack, analysis_options.yaml, .gitignore, main.dart with ProviderScope, app.dart with MaterialApp.router, router.dart with routes for all 3 features, theme.dart, core/ skeleton, shared/ skeleton, l10n/, test/ directories mirroring features, and README.md.
expectations: pubspec.yaml contains flutter_riverpod, go_router, dio, freezed_annotation, json_annotation as dependencies
pubspec.yaml contains riverpod_generator, build_runner, freezed, json_serializable, mocktail as dev_dependencies
router.dart contains 'GoRouter' and routes for auth, products, cart
Three feature directories exist: features/auth/, features/products/, features/cart/
Each feature has data/, presentation/, providers/ subdirectories
Feature repository files follow naming: auth_repository.dart, products_repository.dart, cart_repository.dart
analysis_options.yaml has prefer_const_constructors, avoid_print, prefer_single_quotes rules
test/ directory exists with feature subdirectories
No StatefulWidget appears in any generated Dart file

evals.prompt: I'm starting a new Flutter project. Just give me the basic structure to get going. org is com.myapp, project name my_app.
evals.expected_output: Minimal but complete Flutter project with single 'home' feature (default), all standard boilerplate files, no test scaffolding.
expectations: Default feature 'home' is scaffolded with data/, presentation/, providers/
router.dart contains GoRouter with at least a '/' route
All generated file names are snake_case

evals.prompt: Set up a Flutter project called fitness_tracker with org com.healthco. Features: workouts, profile, stats. Include tests please. No gitignore needed.
evals.expected_output: Complete Flutter project with 3 features, test scaffolding, but no .gitignore file.
expectations: Three features scaffolded: workouts, profile, stats
Each feature has data/, presentation/, providers/ with correctly named files
test/ directory exists with test files for each feature
No .gitignore file exists (user said no gitignore)
router.dart has routes for workouts, profile, stats
l10n/app_en.arb has appTitle with 'FitnessTracker' or similar
